title: eleocharis obtusa var. engelmannii
intro: Eleocharis obtusa var. engelmannii is a type of sedge plant, a flowering plant in the family Cyperaceae. It is also known as Engelmann's spike-rush, a plant that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its uses and preparations may vary depending on the region and cultural context.
